title: The Evolution of Big Data: From Data Collection to Modern Analytics
description: A timeline showing the key technological and conceptual milestones that defined the evolution of big data, leading to its current definition characterized by the 3 Vs (Volume, Velocity, Variety) and beyond.
elements: 2010s: Proliferation of NoSQL Databases & Cloud Computing
Present: AI/ML Integration & Expansion to 5Vs (Value, Veracity)
relationships: Shows the chronological progression of technological advancements
Each stage builds upon the previous, enabling the handling of larger and more complex data
Led to the formal definition of Big Data based on its key characteristics
